```bash
   curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   --data-raw '{
     "filter": {
       "filtersByParty": {
         "'"$BENEFICIARY_PARTY"'": {
           "filters": [
             {
               "inclusive": {
                 "templateFilters": [
                   {"templateId": "#splice-wallet:Splice.Wallet.MintingDelegation:MintingDelegation"}
                 ]
               }
             }
           ]
         }
       }
     }
   }' \
   "$LEDGER_API_URL/v2/state/active-contracts"
```
